title: CSIR-NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: CSIR - National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR-NIO) Project Associate - I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nio.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR-NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: CSIR-NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: CSIR - National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR-NIO) Project Associate - I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nio.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR-NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc Marine Biology / Zoology/Marine Science(specialization in Biology)/Oceanography(specialization in Biology)
qualification.details: MSc Marine Biology / Zoology/Marine Science (specialization in Biology) / Oceanography (specialization in Biology)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR-NIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR-NIO Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate - I position at CSIR-NIO is 31st May 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MSc degree in Marine Biology, Zoology, Marine Science (with a specialization in Biology), or Oceanography (with a specialization in Biology) to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate - I post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate - I position at CSIR-NIO through this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CSIR-NIO Project Associate - I recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Associate - I at CSIR-NIO is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the CSIR-NIO located?
faq.answer: The CSIR-NIO is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, as per the provided information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is SSP3461/3182-26.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: While the location is mentioned as Mumbai, Maharashtra, the notification does not specify any state-wise restrictions for applicants. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply.
